hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED: These files are auto-generated by build.js. Edit the templates in build.js instead, then run: node build.js' && exit 1

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['index.html','works.html','writing.html','atlas.html','atlas-3d.html']; const tokens=['--bg','--ink','--gold','--serif','--sans']; const vals={}; let drift=false; files.forEach(f=>{ if(!fs.existsSync(f))return; const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); tokens.forEach(t=>{ const m=c.match(new RegExp(t+':\\\\s*([^;]+)')); if(m){if(!vals[t])vals[t]=m[1].trim(); else if(vals[t]!==m[1].trim()){console.warn('TOKEN DRIFT: '+t+' is '+m[1].trim()+' in '+f+' but '+vals[t]+' elsewhere');drift=true;}} }); }); if(!drift)console.log('✅ Token check passed.');"
